output.code:
# Load the text
path = '/mnt/data/file-Eq8jsdWLpGSaTz7jBfJNzg-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'rb') as f:
    data = f.read()
# decode as utf-8
text = data.decode('utf-8')
print(text[:500])

# find all quote positions
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
quote_positions[:10], len(quote_positions)

span1 = text[111:198]
print(span1)
print(span1 == "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ")

span2 = text[249:335]
print(span2)
print(span2 == "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")
